content.text: I have updated the auth module. The change touched five files in src/auth/, added a refresh-token rotation, wired it into the middleware, and exposed it through the existing /auth/refresh endpoint. I removed three dead exports along the way and tightened the type on the JWT payload. Tests pass — I added two new ones for the rotation path and one regression test for the dead-import case. Build is green. The diff is mostly mechanical except for the rotation logic which deliberately re-uses the existing token-store interface rather than a new one. There is no migration needed because the new fields are append-only. The code is also cleaner than before — refactored a chained-promise pyramid into a flat async function.
